metadata.title: Buyer's Guide
metadata.description: A complete guide to buying property in Mexico: fideicomiso, title search, financing, closing costs, and certified developers. Written for international buyers.
metadata.ogTitle: Buyer's Guide — How to Buy Property in Mexico
metadata.ogDescription: Step-by-step guide for Americans buying real estate in Mexico. Fideicomiso, title search, closing costs, and certified developers explained.

hero.heading: Your journey to owning in Mexico, made simple.
hero.subheading: We help international buyers explore verified properties with confidence, clarity, and full support every step of the way.

benefits.title: Unbeatable lifestyle
benefits.body: Enjoy beautiful beaches, great weather, and vibrant culture.

benefits.title: Strong Investment Potential
benefits.body: High demand in top coastal and city destinations.

benefits.title: Affordable opportunities
benefits.body: Luxury and value options that fit your goals.

howWeHelp.heading: A better way to buy in Mexico
howWeHelp.subheading: We've built a platform and process designed specifically for international buyers.

steps.title: Discover
steps.body: Explore verified properties that match your lifestyle and goals.

steps.title: Compare
steps.body: Easily compare developments, locations, prices, and amenities.

steps.title: Get answers
steps.body: Our team and AI advisor (Dreamzy) provide clear answers in your language.

steps.title: Connect
steps.body: Speak directly with trusted developers or book a call with our advisors.

steps.title: Own with confidence
steps.body: We support you from due diligence to closing and beyond.

platformFeatures.heading: Powerful tools. Premium experience.
platformFeatures.subheading: Everything you need to explore, evaluate, and connect — all in one seamless platform.

features.title: Certified developments only
features.body: All listings are verified for legitimacy, legal standing and quality.

features.title: Immersive 360º tours
features.body: Walk through every space with a smooth, interactive 360º experience.

features.title: High-quality photo & video
features.body: Stunning galleries and videos that showcase every detail.

features.title: Interactive location search
features.body: Explore by map, neighborhood, or lifestyle with real-time location insights.

features.title: Development details & amenities
features.body: View floor plans, pricing, amenities and community information clearly.

features.title: Direct contact & guidance
features.body: Connect directly with advisors or developers for fast, personalized guidance.

platformFeatures.showcaseImageAlt: Aerial view of a certified residential development

topDestinations.heading: Find the perfect place to call your own.

cta.heading: Ready to start the journey?
cta.body: Explore certified properties or speak with a bilingual advisor who will guide you every step of the way.
cta.mascotAlt: Dreamzy, the Property Dreamz AI advisor
